messages.content: Investiga las últimas tendencias en IA generativa en 2025

<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "generative AI trends 2025 latest developments", "limit": 10, "extract_content": true}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "IA generativa tendencias 2025 modelos", "limit": 5, "language": "es"}}</tool_call>
Research quantum computing and give me a summary

<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "quantum computing current state 2025 breakthroughs", "limit": 8}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "fetch_url", "arguments": {"url": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quantum_computing", "extract_main_content": true, "max_chars": 3000}}</tool_call>
Lee este PDF y dame un resumen ejecutivo

<tool_call>{"name": "exec_command", "arguments": {"command": "pdftotext {{pdf_path}} - | head -500", "timeout": 30}}</tool_call>

Tras extraer el texto, proceso con IA:
<tool_call>{"name": "ai_process", "arguments": {"prompt": "Generate a 5-bullet executive summary of this document, highlighting key findings, recommendations, and action items: {{extracted_text}}"}}</tool_call>
Find recent papers about LLM fine-tuning techniques

<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "LLM fine-tuning LoRA QLoRA PEFT techniques 2024 2025 arxiv", "limit": 10}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "site:arxiv.org LLM fine-tuning survey 2025", "limit": 5}}</tool_call>
Busca la documentación oficial de FastAPI sobre autenticación

<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "fastapi authentication security JWT official docs site:fastapi.tiangolo.com", "limit": 3}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "fetch_url", "arguments": {"url": "https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/tutorial/security/", "extract_main_content": true}}</tool_call>
Compare React vs Vue vs Angular in 2025

<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "React vs Vue vs Angular comparison 2025 performance ecosystem", "limit": 8}}</tool_call>

Basándome en los resultados, comparo en 5 dimensiones:

| Criterio | React | Vue | Angular |
|---|---|---|---|
| Curva aprendizaje | Media | Baja | Alta |
| Performance | Alta | Alta | Alta |
| Ecosistema | Enorme | Grande | Grande |
| Empresa | Meta | Comunidad | Google |
| Ideal para | SPAs grandes | Proyectos medios | Enterprise |

**Recomendación 2025**: React para equipos grandes y mercado laboral, Vue para proyectos nuevos con prototipado rápido, Angular para enterprise con TypeScript estricto.
Download and analyze this YouTube video's content

<tool_call>{"name": "exec_command", "arguments": {"command": "yt-dlp --write-auto-sub --sub-lang es,en --skip-download -o '/tmp/video_%(id)s.%(ext)s' '{{youtube_url}}'", "timeout": 30}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "exec_command", "arguments": {"command": "cat /tmp/video_*.vtt 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^[0-9]' | grep -v '^$' | head -200", "timeout": 10}}</tool_call>
¿Cuáles son las mejores prácticas para diseñar APIs REST?

<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "REST API best practices 2025 design principles", "limit": 5}}</tool_call>

**Las mejores prácticas consolidadas:**

1. **Nombres de recursos en plural**: `/users` no `/user`
2. **Verbos HTTP correctos**: GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE
3. **Versioning**: `/api/v1/users`
4. **Códigos de estado apropiados**: 200/201/400/401/403/404/422/500
5. **Paginación**: `?page=1&per_page=20` o cursor-based
6. **Filtrado**: `?status=active&sort=created_at&order=desc`
7. **HATEOAS**: incluir links a recursos relacionados
8. **Rate limiting**: headers `X-RateLimit-*`
9. **Autenticación**: Bearer tokens en header, nunca en URL
10. **Documentación**: OpenAPI/Swagger spec
Analyze this URL and extract the main information
<tool_call>{"name": "fetch_url", "arguments": {"url": "{{provided_url}}", "extract_main_content": true, "include_metadata": true, "max_chars": 5000}}</tool_call>
Generate a research report about blockchain technology in supply chain

<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "blockchain supply chain real world use cases 2025", "limit": 10}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "blockchain supply chain challenges limitations research", "limit": 5}}</tool_call>

Tras recopilar fuentes, genero el informe:
<tool_call>{"name": "ai_process", "arguments": {"prompt": "Write a comprehensive research report on blockchain in supply chain management with: Executive Summary, Current State, Top Use Cases, Challenges, Future Outlook, and Bibliography format."}}</tool_call>
Busca información sobre el precio de una casa en Madrid
<tool_call>{"name": "web_search", "arguments": {"query": "precio vivienda Madrid 2025 por zonas m2", "limit": 8, "language": "es"}}</tool_call>
